title: crepinia solstitialis
intro: Crepinia solstitialis, also known as the Yellow-veined Violet or Solstitial Violet, is a perennial flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepinia solstitialis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to stimulate appetite. Traditionally, Crepinia solstitialis is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions by boiling its roots and leaves in water to harness its medicinal properties.
